description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration that runs on every push to master and develop branches, and on pull requests. Skip jobs when only documentation files are changed. Use two jobs: build-linux on ubuntu-latest and build-windows on windows-latest. The linux job uses a matrix of containers, sets up the environment, configures and builds the project with CMake, runs unit tests, and performs functional tests. The windows job sets up vcpkg, downloads and installs dependencies, gets the CUDA toolkit, and builds and bundles the project.
